name: nexus-analytics
description: Nexus Analytics (thin) — a domain extension for the `nexus` core pipeline. Ships the data-analyst persona (batched-interview intake, model-first navigation, answer-contract discipline) plus its method skills: semantic-model-query (the resolution ladder — grain, metric, dimension — with mandatory pre-query obligations), data-investigation (delegates unknown-column/flag meaning to the mine-semantic-model skill), answer-qa (the shipped-answer contract), value-briefing (gated, explicit-invocation-only — governed worth/prioritization/monetization briefings over the consuming project's value model, every number labeled measured vs estimated), and value-ledger (the ESTIMATED-to-MEASURED value-claim lifecycle; the ledger artifact lives in the consuming project's docs/value-ledger/). All model access is mediated by the consuming project's docs/semantic-model/profile.md — representation-agnostic (JSON bundle or CSV trio). Requires nexus core installed — install ALONGSIDE nexus, not instead of it.
